subcodes.first_line: O friends! This is the Day which all the peoples of the earth, from diverse parties and sects, were promised [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دوستان امروز روزی است که جمیع امم ارض از احزاب مختلفه بان وعده داده شدند
subcodes.subjects: @purpose; goal of creation, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @firmness in the Covenant
